Light curves kindly provided by Evie

WASP-94Ab:
- paper is here: https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/2022MNRAS.510.4857A/abstract
- light curves are available here: https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/2022yCat..75104857A/abstract 

HATS-46b:
- paper is here: https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/2023MNRAS.521.5636A/abstract 
- light curves are available here: https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/2023yCat..75215636A/abstract 

The .dat files contain the light curve data. The csv files contain parameters estimated in the references papers. The entry with wavelength 0 corresponds to the white light curve.
